subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-20 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Naraq is one of the Provinces of Persian wherein the Cause made its appearance from the beginning, and many people embraced the Teachings.... ...Haji Kamaleddin was one of God's own servants, severed from aught else save him, enkindled
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
